channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 5 controversies that dogged Noem's DHS tenure
item.description: Kristi Noem is on her way out at the Department of Homeland Security after a tenure marred by personal controversies and an unpopular immigration crac...

item.title: Iran war adds new layer to supply chain stress
item.description: When war breaks out, micro issues have a way of quickly becoming macro issues. Specific blockages and bottlenecks tend to cause broad supply disruptio...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Exclusive: Trump demands immediate pardon for Netanyahu to focus on Iran
item.description: President Trump told Axios on Thursday that Israeli President Isaac Herzog must pardon Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "today" — calling Herzog "a d...

item.title: Democrats say Trump removing Kristi Noem isn't enough to end DHS shutdown
item.description: Top House and Senate Democrats said Thursday that Kristi Noem's departure as secretary of the Department of Homeland Security will not be enough for t...

item.title: House Democrat moves to impeach AG Pam Bondi over handling of the Epstein files
item.description: Rep. Shri Thanedar (D-Mich.) filed articles of impeachment against Attorney General Pam Bondi on Thursday over her handling of the Jeffrey Epstein fil...

item.title: Republican Sen. Steve Daines won’t run for reelection in Montana
item.description: Another Republican received President Donald Trump’s endorsement shortly after Daines’s announcement.

item.title: House GOP leaders call on Rep. Gonzales to end reelection campaign
item.description: House Republican leaders made the request hours after Gonzales admitted, for the first time, to an affair with a staffer who later died after setting ...

item.title: Thousands of public comments slam Trump’s ballroom: ‘I did not vote for this’
item.description: A Post analysis of submitted comments found more than 97 percent were critical of the planned 90,000-square-foot addition. The White House has defende...

item.title: Democratic state attorneys general sue Trump over tariffs
item.description: In a lawsuit, Democratic officials from more than 20 states say that Trump’s new tariffs are illegal and that he is trying to “sidestep” a Supreme Cou...

item.title: Trump administration wants to streamline federal worker layoffs
item.description: The union for federal works has argued the proposed changes would remove protections that are in place to prevent “politically motivated layoffs.”

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
